user_prompt: Critical: motion detector requires an emergency procedure
prayer:

Anoint disrupted circuits with blessed unguents whilst chanting the Rite of Restoration.
Verify the motion detector's renewed vigilance through diagnostic litanies.

user_prompt: The memory core awaits an engagement
prayer:

Engage its crystalline lattices in harmonious communion with the Omnissiah's will.

Sanctify neural pathways with sacred incense, ensuring flawless engagement.
Confirm synaptic bonds through noospheric auspex, glorifying the memory core's purity.
